testcase.name: TC-001 to 004 - Registration Variations #1
testcase.system-out: @Registration @Bulk Scenario Outline: TC-001 to 004 - Registration Variations # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:12 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/account" with status 200 and body "{'idVerified': 'True', 'status': 'Success'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/account" with body "{'locationId': '38137'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 200 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "idVerified" as "True" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: TC-001 to 004 - Registration Variations #2
testcase.system-out: @Registration @Bulk Scenario Outline: TC-001 to 004 - Registration Variations # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:13 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/account" with status 202 and body "{'status': 'error', 'errorMessage': 'CIP failed'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/account" with body "{'locationId': '38137'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 202 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "errorMessage" as "CIP failed" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.system-out: @Registration @Bulk Scenario Outline: TC-001 to 004 - Registration Variations # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:14 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/account" with status 400 and body "{'status': 'error', 'errorMessage': 'Invalid Loc'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/account" with body "{'locationId': '38137'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 400 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "errorMessage" as "Invalid Loc" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC-001 to 004 - Registration Variations #4
testcase.system-out: @Registration @Bulk Scenario Outline: TC-001 to 004 - Registration Variations # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:15 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/account" with status 403 and body "{'status': 'error', 'errorMessage': 'Blocked'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/account" with body "{'locationId': '38137'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 403 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "errorMessage" as "Blocked" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC-005 to 030 - Financial, Fee, and Admin Processing #1
testcase.system-out: @Transactions @Spending @Admin Scenario Outline: TC-005 to 030 - Financial, Fee, and Admin Processing # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:26 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/transact/atm" with status 200 and body "{'status': 'Approved'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/transact/atm" with body "{'amt': '200'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 200 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "status" as "Approved" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.system-out: @Transactions @Spending @Admin Scenario Outline: TC-005 to 030 - Financial, Fee, and Admin Processing # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:27 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/transact/pos" with status 200 and body "{'status': 'Approved'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/transact/pos" with body "{'amt': '50'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 200 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "status" as "Approved" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC-005 to 030 - Financial, Fee, and Admin Processing #3
testcase.system-out: @Transactions @Spending @Admin Scenario Outline: TC-005 to 030 - Financial, Fee, and Admin Processing # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:28 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/transact/int" with status 403 and body "{'error': 'International Disabled'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/transact/int" with body "{'country': 'UK'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 403 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "error" as "Disabled" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.system-out: @Transactions @Spending @Admin Scenario Outline: TC-005 to 030 - Financial, Fee, and Admin Processing # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:29 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/transact/pin" with status 401 and body "{'error': 'Invalid PIN'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/transact/pin" with body "{'pin': 'wrong'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 401 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "error" as "Invalid" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.system-out: @Security @CardLifeCycle Scenario Outline: TC-031 to 034 - Card Status Transitions # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:60 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/card/replace" with status 200 and body "{'newStatus': 'Replaced'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/card/replace" with body "{'cardToken': 'card_998877'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 200 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "newStatus" as "Replaced" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC-031 to 034 - Card Status Transitions #3
testcase.system-out: @Security @CardLifeCycle Scenario Outline: TC-031 to 034 - Card Status Transitions # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:61 Given the API is stubbed for "POST" at "/card/temp-block" with status 200 and body "{'newStatus': 'Suspended'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "POST" API "/card/temp-block" with body "{'cardToken': 'card_998877'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 200 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "newStatus" as "Suspended" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC-035 - Balance Inquiry
testcase.system-out: @Transactions Scenario: TC-035 - Balance Inquiry # src/test/resources/features/AccountManagement.feature:67 Given the API is stubbed for "GET" at "/balance" with status 200 and body "{'balance': '1250.75', 'currency': 'USD'}" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.universalStub(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String) When I call the "GET" API "/balance" with body "" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.callApi(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response code should be 200 # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkStatus(int) And the response should contain "balance" as "1250.75" # com.expanse.steps.ExpanseSteps.checkBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
